title: Bodhi's Brave Night Light
synopsis: When Bodhi's night light breaks before bedtime, he feels scared of the dark. With help from his mama and papa, he discovers he can be brave and find comfort in the soft moonlight and gentle sounds of nighttime.

pages.text: Bodhi loved his special night light. It glowed soft and blue like a tiny moon in his room. Every night, Mama would tuck him in and turn on his night light. "Sweet dreams, my brave boy," she would say.

illustration.description: A cozy bedroom with warm yellow walls and a small bed with colorful blankets. Bodhi, a young South Asian boy with dark curly hair, sits on his bed in blue pajamas with star patterns. A gentle blue night light glows on his nightstand. His mama, a woman with long dark hair in a purple sweater, sits beside him smiling warmly.
illustration.alt: Bodhi in his pajamas sitting on his bed with his mama, with a blue night light glowing nearby

pages.text: But tonight was different. When Mama pressed the button, the night light didn't turn on. "Oh no," said Mama. "It looks like your night light is broken." Bodhi felt scared. His room looked so dark without his friendly blue glow.

illustration.description: The same bedroom but now dimmer with only soft lamplight from the hallway. Bodhi's eyes are wide with worry, and his mama looks concerned as she examines the broken night light. The room feels bigger and darker around them. Shadows create gentle patterns on the textured walls.
illustration.alt: Bodhi looking worried while his mama examines the broken night light in the darker room

pages.text: "I don't like the dark," Bodhi said in a small voice. His bottom lip trembled and he felt tears in his eyes. Mama gave him a big, warm hug. "I understand, little one. Sometimes the dark can feel scary. But you know what? You are braver than you think."

illustration.description: Mama holding Bodhi in a gentle embrace on the bed. Bodhi's face shows he's feeling sad and scared, with a slight frown and teary eyes. Mama's expression is loving and comforting. Soft golden light from the hallway creates a warm glow around them both against the textured bedroom walls.
illustration.alt: Mama hugging Bodhi lovingly as he feels sad and scared about the dark

pages.text: Papa came in with his gentle smile. "What if we look for other friendly lights?" he asked. Together, they noticed the soft moonlight coming through the window. "Look, Bodhi! The moon is your night light tonight," Papa said. Bodhi felt a little bit better.

illustration.description: Papa, a tall South Asian man with a beard wearing a green shirt, points toward the window where silvery moonlight streams in. Bodhi sits between his parents, looking curious and slightly hopeful. The moon creates beautiful silver patterns on the floor and walls, making the room feel magical rather than scary.
illustration.alt: Papa showing Bodhi the moonlight coming through the window while they sit together on the bed

pages.text: "Listen," whispered Mama. They heard gentle sounds - the soft tick-tock of the clock, Papa's quiet breathing, and the whoosh of wind in the trees outside. "These are nighttime's lullabies," she said. Bodhi felt safe between his mama and papa.

illustration.description: All three family members sitting quietly on the bed, listening. Their faces show peace and contentment. Musical notes and soft sound waves float gently in the air around them. The room is bathed in gentle moonlight with warm, rounded shapes creating a cozy atmosphere.
illustration.alt: Bodhi and his parents sitting peacefully together, listening to gentle nighttime sounds

pages.text: "I think I can be brave," Bodhi said, snuggling under his soft blankets. Mama and Papa kissed him goodnight. As they left, Bodhi watched the friendly moonlight dance on his wall. He felt happy and brave. "Goodnight, moon light," he whispered, and closed his eyes with a smile.

illustration.description: Bodhi lying peacefully in his bed with a content smile, blankets pulled up cozy. The moonlight creates gentle, dancing patterns on his wall. His parents can be seen in the doorway, silhouetted with warm light behind them. The whole scene feels serene and safe, with soft blues and silvers throughout.
illustration.alt: Bodhi smiling peacefully in bed with moonlight patterns on the wall and his parents in the doorway

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Bodhi feel when his night light broke?
questions.explanation: Bodhi felt scared when his night light broke because he didn't like the dark.

questions.question: What did Papa show Bodhi to help him feel better?
questions.explanation: Papa showed Bodhi the moonlight coming through the window and said it could be his night light.

questions.question: What sounds did Mama help Bodhi listen to?
questions.explanation: Mama helped Bodhi listen to gentle sounds like the clock ticking and wind in the trees.

questions.question: How did Bodhi feel at the end of the story?
questions.explanation: At the end, Bodhi felt happy and brave because he found comfort in the moonlight and his family's love.

pages.text: Bodhi felt _____ when his night light broke.
Papa showed Bodhi the friendly _____ in the window.
At the end, Bodhi felt _____ and brave.
